svg.title: Moonbox TUI screenshot
svg.desc: A generated terminal screenshot of Moonbox showing Handoff Review, capsule content, verifier readiness details, and Vim-style key hints.
svg.text: Conclusion: raw session copy is the wrong abstraction.
evt-091 / Before raw resume. Compile new Work Capsule for Hermes.
Continue Moonbox session rewind design from selected rewind point.
Source session is read-only; Moonbox only builds a handoff plan.
Built-in draft compiler may omit tool outputs, attachments, and hidden provider state.
capsule source Codex / codex-cxcp-design vs selected Codex / codex-cxcp-design
capsule target Hermes vs requested Hermes
enter handoff y copy command Esc/q close
c review handoff | enter open original | s star
